author: JB
text: 36M-ish distance checks/tick means *any* per-check transcendental is fatal — precompute is mandatory. I'll thread the precomputed `conspicuousness` (free via `BodySize`'s cached `inv_sqrt_length`) through the rebuild into the proxy. Let me find the `entity_scratch` type and `rebuild_parallel` signature to thread it cleanly.

author: JB
text: Itook a snapshot, looks good to me, check
